message:
feat(io_driver): add turn_with() callback for per-event trace recording

Extend IoDriver with a turn_with() method that accepts a per-event
callback, enabling callers to record traces, metrics, or diagnostics
for each I/O readiness event before the associated task waker fires.

IoDriver changes (src/runtime/io_driver.rs):
- Add turn_with(timeout, on_event) that invokes the callback with each
  Event reference before dispatching the waker — existing turn() now
  delegates to turn_with with a no-op callback for zero overhead
- Expose turn_with on IoDriverHandle so the lab runtime can call it
  through the handle without taking the full driver lock externally

LabRuntime integration (src/lab/runtime.rs):
- poll_io() now calls handle.turn_with() instead of driver.turn(),
  recording TraceEvent::io_ready and replay_recorder.record_io_ready
  for each event — this makes I/O completions visible in both the
  trace buffer (for test oracles) and the replay log (for deterministic
  replay)
- Add lab_runtime_records_io_ready_trace test (Unix-only): registers a
  mock source, injects a readable event via lab_reactor, advances time,
  steps, and asserts an IoReady trace event was recorded

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
